import React from 'react' import '../styles/tour-details.css' import { Container, Row, Col } from 'reactstrap' import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom' import tourdata from '../assets/data/tours' const TourDetails = () => { const { id } = useParams() const tour = tourdata.find(tour => tour.id === id) const { photo, title, desc, price, reviews, city, distance } = tour return
Tour Details
} export default TourDetails
